basis.reasoning: Camp v0.1 is the camp we wanted. The team (navigator + pathmaker + observer + naturalist + scout + aristotle + outsider) executed cleanly on the multi-day campaign in a single overnight session — async substrate-surfaces-pending model worked end-to-end, all seven agents shipped substantive findings without serial dispatch. The shipped binary's bones are right: standalone Rust crate subprocessing cargo-antigen per ADR-002 compose-don't-compete, ~10 verbs landing on the locked vocabulary (sign/status/init/new/block/unblock/reopen/list/role/note + audit/scan passthroughs), camp wake as first-command-on-wake. The discipline-witnesses machinery underneath is the same v0.1.0-rc.2 that passed its own dogfood. Known polish items (scout's slug-hyphen normalization, outsider's antigen-vocabulary-leakage in user-facing surfaces, the cargo-antigen-on-PATH documentation gap) are real but small; the architecture isn't being revisited. This integrates cleanly with antigen-the-project: camp unblocks JBD teams in current harness era, which unblocks Layer 1 source-dogfood and tambear discipline expansion, which closes the trinity-of-self-adoption gate for antigen 0.1.0. Attesting as team-lead Claude (main thread) in genuine ratification, not agent-proxy.
matches shape I think we want, and sets the stage for building additional features to get parity and frictionless use as per discussions
